title: 10 best herbal tinctures for vaginitis
description: Bearberry tinctures helps with vaginitis because of its antimicrobial properties, which help to combat bacteria that can cause infection. Additionally, the antioxidants in bearberry may help to reduce oxidative stress, promoting a healthy vaginal environment.
